reviews.comment:

Clean and sanitized bathrooms and the shopping shop is well stocked with a variety of brands.

reviews.comment:
Deberían trabajar en mejorar/ optimizar los tiempos de carga de combustible. Los operadores no abastecen en paralelo teniendo surtidores disponibles.

(Translated by Google)
They should work on improving/optimizing refueling times. Operators aren't refueling simultaneously even though pumps are available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1OTgzNHV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para disfrutar un café entre amigos, la atención y la limpieza excelente. Lo recomiendo..

(Translated by Google)
Lovely place to enjoy a coffee with friends, excellent service and cleanliness. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cC1DTllBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena y rápida su atención. Un poco falto de información cuando uno sale desde la estación de servicios y quiere continuar hacia Cruz del Eje. Los que no son de la zona pueden confundirse en la salida hacia la ruta

(Translated by Google)
Excellent and prompt service. A bit lacking in information when leaving the service station and trying to continue toward Cruz del Eje. Those not from the area may get confused on the exit to the route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1elpiNlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
La NAFTA aumenta a la par del dólar, ahora cuando el dólar baja la NAFTA no baja, buena atención ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline prices rise in tandem with the dollar, but now when the dollar falls, gas prices don't. Good service, ACA.

reviews.comment:
Tradicional estación de servicio con un buen Shop y atención cordial aunque a veces un poco lenta.
Se puede abonar con la app de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Traditional gas station with a good shop and friendly service, although sometimes a bit slow.
You can pay with the YPF app.
